upload.description: Specify the player ID to save this file data under. If you enter an existing player ID, records will be merged with that player's history.
report.title: Tuning Statistics Report
report.luck_score_formula: Luck Score = (Total Expected Pulls / Total Actual Pulls) * 100
report.luck_score_description: The fewer actual pulls spent compared to the expectation, the higher the score rises above 100%, indicating a lucky state.
report.luck_score_pity_warn: If a standard character appears on a limited banner, the pulls spent are carried into the next pickup cycle for evaluation.
